stories.title: Replace Replit auth (subtractive) on passport-local
acceptanceCriteria: rg replit refs confined to server/github/replitConnection.ts + importer (e2e-evidence/phase1/replit-refs.txt)

stories.title: Containerize + harden (non-root, healthcheck, shutdown)
acceptanceCriteria: docker compose up --build: both awesome-list-db + awesome-list-app healthy, no crash loop (e2e-evidence/phase2/ps.txt)
SIGTERM/SIGINT graceful shutdown closes server + pool.end in server/index.ts

stories.title: Re-baseline migrations + idempotent seed (HIGH RISK)
acceptanceCriteria: res-total after docker compose restart EQUALS res-total (idempotent + persistent)

stories.title: Production deploy config (Railway + DO, no live deploy)
acceptanceCriteria: .do/app.yaml exists + parses (service from Dockerfile, http_port 5000, health /api/health, secrets type SECRET)
no non-/api /health route refs outside docs

stories.title: Exhaustive browser-driven functional audit + remediation loop
acceptanceCriteria: 17 screens + 14 admin tabs audited at 7 breakpoints; matrix.md 100% PASS/FIXED
every cell: zero console errors, zero >=400 requests, overflow probe pass, counts==DB baseline
auth register/login/session/logout + one CRUD write persists across docker compose restart
M-02/FP-01/FP-02/FP-03/FX-04/FP-05 confirmed FIXED with screenshot evidence
